title: Earthy Creamy Russian Beet Soup
description: A velvety beet soup with a surprising dulche de leche swirl, perfect for a cozy date night. The creamy coconut milk and fresh dill balance the earthiness, while being FODMAP-friendly.

ingredients.name: Low FODMAP sour cream or Greek yogurt

instructions: Place beets on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast for 35-40 minutes or until tender, then cool, peel, and chop into cubes.
In a medium saucepan, heat the vegetable broth over medium heat.
Add the chopped beets to the broth and simmer for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Remove from heat and use an immersion blender to puree the beet mixture until smooth.
Return the pot to low heat, stir in coconut milk, dulce de leche, fresh dill, lemon juice, smoked paprika, and additional salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer gently for 8-10 minutes, ensuring the soup stays warm but not boiling.
Before serving, swirl in the low FODMAP sour cream or Greek yogurt for extra creaminess.
Transfer soup to bowls and garnish with chopped scallion greens.
Serve hot with a side of crusty bread or a simple salad for a complete dinner.
